water

the clear liquid that falls as rain

 fire

the flame and heat of burning

 mountain

a very large natural rise of land

 river

a large natural stream of water

 tree

a tall plant with a trunk and branches

 person

a human being

 dog

a common four-legged domestic animal

 cat

a small domesticated feline

 fish

an animal that lives in water

 bird

a feathered animal that can fly

 flower

the blooming part of a plant

 sky

the space above the earth

 sea

a large body of salt water

 moon

the earth's natural satellite

 sun

the star at the center of our system

 star

a distant point of light in the night sky

 rain

water falling from clouds

 snow

frozen rain falling as white flakes

 wind

moving air

 cloud

a mass of water vapor in the sky

 book

a set of printed pages bound together

 car

a road vehicle with an engine

 house

a building where people live

 school

a place for teaching and learning

 teacher

a person who teaches

 student

a person who studies

 friend

a person you like and trust

 mother

a female parent

 father

a male parent

 child

a young human being

 love

a deep feeling of affection

 eat

to take in food

 drink

to take in liquid

 see

to perceive with the eyes

 hear

to perceive sound

 speak

to say words

 read

to look at and understand writing

 write

to make letters and words

 big

large in size

 small

little in size

 red

the color of blood

 blue

the color of a clear sky

 one

the number 1

 two

the number 2

 three

the number 3
